subject: Quick check-in: how are your mentorship sessions going?
html:
Hi {{mentor_name}},

Some of your mentorship requests haven't had a status update in a while:

{{requests_list}}

If things have moved on, please update their status in your dashboard. When you mark a session as Completed, we'll ask the mentee for feedback on the session — reviews are what make a mentor profile shine.

Update statuses

Thanks for keeping things tidy!
The OpenMentor Team
